hero.name: Patrikas
hero.description: 4+ years of experience building modern web applications using React, Next.js and Node.js.

about.label: About me
about.title: A bit about myself
about.paragraph1: I'm a frontend developer with full-stack experience, currently working at Oxylabs.io and open to freelance projects. Over the past 2 years I've balanced a full-time role with up to 30h/week of freelance work — architecting SaaS products, integrating payment systems, and building complete solutions from scratch.
about.paragraph2: I enjoy building fast, clean, and well-structured projects. I work diligently and communicate clearly.

contact.description: Have a project or question? Reach out - reply within 24h.
contact.contactIntro: Open to freelance projects and full-time roles. I respond to all messages within 24 hours.
